title: 澳亚裔医生潜伏医院女厕偷拍460人？硬盘藏上万视频，还按病人同事精心分类？ | 原文
content: An Asian-Australian doctor at Melbourne's Austin Hospital pleaded guilty to secretly installing hidden cameras in women's restrooms over four years, recording approximately 460 victims including patients and colleagues. Police discovered tens of thousands of meticulously categorized videos on his hard drive. The case, exposed in July 2025 when a staff member found a suspicious bag in a bathroom, is described as one of Australia's largest and most shocking privacy violations.

title: 特朗普，开掉“不听话的情报头子” | 原文
content: U.S. National Intelligence Director Tulsi Gabbard is leaving the White House after 15 months, citing her husband's rare bone cancer diagnosis. However, Reuters reports she also faced pressure from the administration due to her skeptical stance on overseas military interventions. As a "restraint advocate" in Trump's government, she was sidelined in decisions regarding Venezuela and Iran. A close aide resigned in March protesting military action against Iran, worsening her position. Trump acknowledged their thinking differed on several issues.

title: chopratejas/headroom
content: Headroom is a Python tool that compresses outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach language models, reducing token usage by 60–95% without sacrificing answer quality. It functions as a library, proxy, or MCP server. The project has 5,040 stars and 387 forks on GitHub.
source: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - chopratejas

title: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
content: Open-LLM-VTuber is a Python application enabling hands-free voice conversations with large language models. It supports voice interruption and displays an animated Live2D avatar. The software runs locally across multiple platforms. The project has 8,065 stars and 1,059 forks.

content: Chinese actor Wei Zongwan died on June 1, 2026, at age 89. The Shanghai-born performer, a Shanghai Drama Academy graduate, appeared in classic films and TV series including "Romance of the Three Kingdoms" (1994), where he played Sima Yi, "Water Margin" (1998), and "Sanmao Joins the Army." title: 国发〔2026〕11号文的核心：公共服务与户籍解绑 | 原文
content: China's State Council Document No. 11 of 2026, issued May 22, 2026, fundamentally separates basic public services from household registration (hukou). The core principle: services follow the person, not the hukou. For the first time at the national level, China will systematically eliminate barriers tying education, healthcare, and other benefits to one's registered birthplace. The policy directly benefits approximately 358 million migrant workers and 480 million people living apart from their household registration location.

title: 夏威夷野鸡泛滥数量或超几十万只，政府诱捕一只要花超 100 美元，为啥会这样？有没有好的解决办法？
content: Hawaii's feral chicken problem stems from hurricanes in the 1990s-2000s that destroyed coops, releasing domestic chickens that interbred with wild red junglefowl. Without natural predators and aided by human food waste, the hybrid population exploded to hundreds of thousands. The chickens damage parks, agriculture, and create noise complaints. Removal costs approximately $100 per bird due to their protected "wildlife" status, leaving most communities to tolerate the persistent nuisance.

title: 中产的夏天，正在戒掉「穷人的啤酒」？
content: Fruit puree beer has become the new trend among China's middle class, replacing industrial lagers and earlier craft favorites like milk and tea beers. These thick, brightly colored brews contain up to 50% real fruit puree, masking bitterness with intense sweetness and fruit flavors. While critics argue the fruit overwhelms traditional brewing artistry, supporters cite their accessibility and social media appeal. The shift reflects broader changes: Chinese beer consumption has declined 30% since 2013, with consumers moving away from bland, cheap lagers toward premium, experience-driven beverages that blur lines between beer, juice, and dessert drinks.

title: 山东诞生一家AI黑马
content:
Shandong-based Henyuan Technology, founded in 2016 by former Foxconn and Siemens engineer Yongwen Zhang, has emerged as a notable industrial AI player. The company focuses on intelligent manufacturing solutions for complex equipment manufacturing, serving over 500 clients including major Chinese state-owned aerospace and defense enterprises.

Henyuan recently unveiled "H4 OntoX," an AI-native ontology-driven industrial large-model engine at the Hannover Messe in Germany. Unlike traditional fixed-process industrial AI or general-purpose LLMs, the system applies structured causal reasoning drawn from thousands of real production scenarios, enabling autonomous decision-making for new manufacturing situations without preset scripts.

The company has raised multiple funding rounds, attracting investors including provincial Shandong state capital and established venture firms. Henyuan aims to evolve from selling tools to becoming an infrastructure platform that defines industry standards for industrial AGI applications.

title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
content: Companies are finding AI token costs exceed employee salaries. Uber's CTO revealed 90% of engineers use AI heavily, burning through their 2026 AI budget in just four months, with per-employee monthly costs reaching $500-$2,000. Nvidia's VP similarly noted compute costs now surpass personnel expenses. The surge stems from AI agents performing recursive, self-correcting tasks that consume tokens exponentially. Some firms misguidedly use token consumption as a productivity KPI, despite no proven correlation with value output. Experts argue this reflects poor workflow adaptation rather than technology itself, urging companies to optimize human-AI collaboration rather than simply increase usage.

title: Anthropic 已秘密提交 IPO 申请 估值近万亿美元
content: AI company Anthropic has confidentially filed for a U.S. IPO to test investor appetite for AI ventures. The Claude chatbot operator raised $6.5 billion in May at a $965 billion valuation, more than double its February valuation and exceeding rival OpenAI. The filing follows SpaceX's recent IPO and precedes OpenAI's expected registration. A near-trillion-dollar valuation would place Anthropic among the S&P 500's largest companies, potentially revitalizing the sluggish IPO market, though experts warn it could drain liquidity and distract from smaller listings.

title: 宇树科技科创板 IPO 过会
content: Unitree Technology's IPO on the Shanghai Stock Exchange's STAR Market has been approved by the exchange's listing review committee. The company met all issuance, listing, and disclosure requirements in its 2026 review session.

title: 英伟达宣布进军 PC 处理器市场，正面挑战苹果与英特尔
content: Nvidia announced its entry into the PC processor market at Computex 2026, launching the Arm-based "RTX Spark" chip co-developed with MediaTek. The chip integrates CPU and RTX graphics units, runs Windows on Arm, and targets Intel's dominance while advancing AI PCs. Dell, Lenovo, and other major PC makers will release laptops and desktops with the chip starting this fall, marking Nvidia's expansion from GPU supplier to full-stack PC platform provider.

title: OpenAI 正式成立机器人团队，进军实体世界 AI
content: OpenAI has established the "OpenAI Robotics" team, targeting physical-world AI applications in construction and infrastructure rather than consumer robotics. Despite limited direct assets in robotics, this marks its first internal strategic commitment to the field. The move comes amid unmet revenue and user growth targets ahead of a potential IPO. OpenAI will compete with Google DeepMind, Tesla, and Boston Dynamics, leveraging its large language model capabilities, though practical product conversion remains uncertain.

title: 英伟达 Isaac GR00T 人形机器人发布：基于宇树 H2 打造，年底推出
content: Nvidia announced the Isaac GR00T humanoid robot reference design, built on Jetson Thor and Isaac GR00T platform with Unitree H2 Plus hardware. The robot stands nearly 1.8 meters tall, weighs approximately 68 kg, and features 75 degrees of freedom. It includes 120 N·m arm torque, 360 N·m leg torque, Jetson AGX Thor T5000 computing, and 0.972 kWh battery providing roughly 3 hours of runtime. The developer platform will also support Unitree G1, with the reference robot expected from Unitree by end of 2026.

title: OpenAI 现场演示「无 App 手机」
content: At OpenAI Voice Hack Night, a team demonstrated an "agentic operating system" for phones that replaces traditional apps with interfaces generated on-device by local models. Heavy reasoning tasks call cloud GPT. Developers used voice commands to book flights, delete calendar events, check AI news, send emails, and create to-do lists.

title: 苹果智能眼镜推迟至 2027 年底发布，其被库克视为交棒前的首要任务
content: Apple's first consumer smart glasses have been delayed to late 2027. The device resembles traditional optical glasses with cameras, audio, calls, Siri, and navigation, but lacks AR displays in its first generation. CEO Tim Cook considers it his top priority before succession. Apple aims to ship 3–5 million units in 2027 amid stalled Vision Pro development. The company faces strong competition from Meta and others, plus challenges in differentiation, battery life, AI chips, and ecosystem building.

title: 豆包 6 月下旬正式付费，并加速打通抖音电商
content: Doubao will officially launch paid subscriptions in late June following commercialization preparations that began in early May. The timing allows roughly one month for PC and mobile adaptations. The paid features will be updated at the同期 Force conference. In Q3, the platform will integrate e-commerce functions with subsidies to drive traffic to Douyin Mall; Q4 will mark operational stability. These steps prepare for long-term commercial returns by 2027, so 2026 will not prioritize paid user penetration rates as a metric.

title: 超越丰田，软银成为日本市值最高公司
content: SoftBank Group overtook Toyota Motor to become Japan's most valuable company for the first time in over two decades. Its market capitalization reached 46 trillion yen (about $300 billion) after its stock surged over 8% to a record high on Monday, driven by the global AI investment boom. The rally was largely fueled by SoftBank's approximately 90% stake in British chip designer Arm Holdings, whose shares have more than doubled since early April.

title: 加州大学研究戳破谎言：印度极端高温一天热死3400人，政府却只承认全年800 | 原文
content: A UC Berkeley study estimates that extreme heat days in India cause approximately 3,400 excess deaths daily, starkly contrasting with official government figures of only about 800 heat-related deaths annually. Researchers Piyush Narang and Ashok Gadgil from the India Energy and Climate Center developed the model. In May 2026, temperatures in northern India exceeded 45 degrees Celsius, highlighting the severe underreporting of heat mortality.

title: Reference your own AWS Secrets Manager secrets in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity
content: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity now allows referencing existing AWS Secrets Manager secrets for outbound credential providers. Previously, AgentCore automatically created and managed secrets with limited configuration options. The new capability lets customers use preconfigured secrets, retaining full control over encryption (including customer-managed KMS keys), rotation, tags, replication, and resource policies. This supports same-Region cross-account secrets and external connectors for third-party secret managers. Users provide the secret ARN and JSON key when creating credential provider resources via console, CLI, or AI agents. Proper IAM permissions for secret access and KMS decryption are required.

title: 王熙凤为什么亲近林黛玉，疏远薛宝钗？原因其实很简单，无关利益 | 原文
content: The article analyzes why Wang Xifeng favored Lin Daiyu over Xue Baochai in *Dream of the Red Chamber*. Using the episode of gifted tea as an example, the author argues that Wang's preference stemmed from personality compatibility rather than self-interest. Wang and Lin shared similarly sharp, direct temperaments and mutual emotional attunement, while Xue Baochai's restrained, calculating nature created distance. Their spontaneous, teasing rapport reflected genuine understanding between equally forthright personalities.

title: 中国四大煤炭上市公司煤矿盘点、吨利润分析
content:
China's four largest listed coal companies faced a bear market in 2025, with 5500 kcal coal prices falling to 610 yuan/ton at ports and 390 yuan/ton at production sites. Analysis covers four areas: cost and price comparison, asset review, profit per ton, and future outlook.

Costs are lowest for China Shenhua, similar for China Coal and Shaanxi Coal, and highest for Yankuang Energy. Selling prices rank: Yankuang > Shaanxi > China Coal > Shenhua. Core assets concentrate in Shaanxi and Inner Mongolia, with large-scale Jurassic coal mines as premium resources.

2025 estimated profit per ton: Shaanxi Coal ~130 yuan, China Coal ~110-115 yuan, Shenhua ~85-90 yuan, Yankuang ~55-65 yuan. Mines with net profit margins exceeding 20% qualify as premium assets.
